title: helenium autumnale var. longifolium
intro: Helenium autumnale var. longifolium, also known as the tall sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of this plant make it beneficial for relieving symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections, as well as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Helenium autumnale var. longifolium are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
